expectedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Catastrophic Avoidance
expectedFeats.summary: Catastrophic failures in Skill Challenges occur less frequently and with milder results.

expectedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Last Resort
expectedFeats.summary: Reroll a third failed Skill Check during a Skill Challenge, keeping the better result.

expectedFeats.name: Skill Challenge: Recovery
expectedFeats.summary: Treat a Skill Challenge as if it had the Recovery challenge effect.
